2603.19221.title: Online Learning and Equilibrium Computation with Ranking Feedback
2603.19221.paper_summary: Online learning in arbitrary, and possibly adversarial, environments has been extensively studied in sequential decision-making, and it is closely connected to equilibrium computation in game theory. Most existing online learning algorithms rely on \emph{numeric} utility feedback from the environment, which may be unavailable in human-in-the-loop applications and/or may be restricted by privacy concerns. In this paper, we study an online learning model in which the learner only observes a \emph{ranking} over a set of proposed actions at each timestep. We consider two ranking mechanisms: rankings induced by the \emph{instantaneous} utility at the current timestep, and rankings induced by the \emph{time-average} utility up to the current timestep, under both \emph{full-information} and \emph{bandit} feedback settings. Using the standard external-regret metric, we show that sublinear regret is impossible with instantaneous-utility ranking feedback in general. Moreover, when the ranking model is relatively deterministic, \emph{i.e.}, under the Plackett-Luce model with a temperature that is sufficiently small, sublinear regret is also impossible with time-average utility ranking feedback. We then develop new algorithms that achieve sublinear regret under the additional assumption that the utility sequence has sublinear total variation. Notably, for full-information time-average utility ranking feedback, this additional assumption can be removed. As a consequence, when all players in a normal-form game follow our algorithms, repeated play yields an approximate coarse correlated equilibrium. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithms in an online large-language-model routing task.
2603.19221.paper_summary_zh: 在線學習在任意且可能對抗的環境中已在序列決策中廣泛研究，並且與博弈論中的均衡計算密切相關。大多數現有的在線學習算法依賴於來自環境的\emph{數值}效用反饋，這在人類參與的應用中可能不可用，或者可能受到隱私問題的限制。在本文中，我們研究一種在線學習模型，其中學習者在每個時間步僅觀察一組提議行動的\emph{排名}。我們考慮兩種排名機制：由當前時間步的\emph{瞬時}效用引起的排名，以及由截至當前時間步的\emph{時間平均}效用引起的排名，在\emph{完全信息}和\emph{強盜}反饋設置下。使用標準的外部後悔度度量，我們表明在一般情況下，使用瞬時效用排名反饋是不可能實現次線性後悔的。此外，當排名模型相對確定時，即在Plackett-Luce模型下，當溫度足夠小時，使用時間平均效用排名反饋也不可能實現次線性後悔。然後，我們開發了新的算法，在效用序列具有次線性總變化的附加假設下實現次線性後悔。值得注意的是，對於完全信息的時間平均效用排名反饋，可以去除這一附加假設。因此，當正常形式博弈中的所有玩家遵循我們的算法時，重複遊戲將產生近似粗略相關均衡。我們還展示了我們的算法在在線大型語言模型路由任務中的有效性。
2603.19221.author: Mingyang Liu et.al.
2603.19221.authors: Mingyang Liu, Yongshan Chen, Zhiyuan Fan, Gabriele Farina, Asuman Ozdaglar, Kaiqing Zhang
